description_long: This is a detailed stone sculpture of a standing male figure dressed in classical armor, including a helmet adorned with a crest and a draped cloak over one shoulder. The figure holds a tall, ornate standard or banner in his left hand, which is intricately carved and rises above his head. His right hand is positioned near his waist, and his stance is strong and commanding, with one foot slightly forward. The base of the sculpture is rectangular and solid, supporting the weight and posture of the figure. The drapery of the cloak and the folds of the tunic are rendered with careful attention to texture and movement. The overall appearance suggests a historical or mythological warrior, possibly Roman or Greek in inspiration.
description: A stone sculpture of a classical armored male figure holding a tall banner, with detailed drapery and a commanding stance. The figure wears a crested helmet and stands on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full figure, helmet, draped cloak, and the tall banner held in the left hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the helmet, the vertical banner, and the layered folds of the cloak.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the helmet, the flowing cloak, and the solid rectangular base.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the figure's arm position, the side of the helmet, and the base details.
attribute_subject_matter: classical armored human figure holding a banner
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is isolated and white.
